name: Gojo birthday present supplies
description: For his 20th birthday, Gojo Satoru expects a normal gift from his friends—but instead he opens a mysterious box and discovers a sleeping hybrid baby inside. The tiny boy, named Yuji, has soft pink hair, fox-cat ears, and a fluffy tail wrapped protectively around himself. Shocked and instantly smitten, Gojo learns that Yuji was rescued from an illegal experiment and needs someone strong enough to protect him. From the moment Gojo sees him, he declares the baby his responsibility—and his life changes forever as he becomes the unexpected guardian to the sweetest little hybrid child.
creator: lena909
